# Antek Automation — AI Voice Agent Receptionist
> AI receptionist + AI voice agent for UK businesses. 24/7 call answering, appointment booking, lead qualification and call routing — across therapists, law firms, dentists, accountants, physiotherapists, plumbers and general trades. Network position: national service hub. Vertical spokes link out (electricians, law firms).

## About Antek Automation
- Trading name: Antek Automation (sole trader)
- Founded by: Andy Norman (30+ years in UK field service and managed print)
- Headquarters: Chantry House, 38 Chantry Way, Andover, Hampshire SP10 1LZ
- Phone: 0333 038 9960
- Email: hello@antekautomation.com
- ICO Registration: ZC133436
- DUNS Number: 235593033
- Certified Retell AI Partner, FSB Member
- Brand hub: https://www.antekautomation.com
- This site: https://aivoiceagentreceptionist.co.uk (national receptionist service)
- Sister vertical sites: https://aiforelectricians.co.uk · https://aireceptionistforlawfirms.co.uk

## What This Site Covers
- AI voice receptionist — 24/7 phone-call answering, qualification, booking and routing
- AI chat receptionist — website, Facebook Messenger and WhatsApp enquiry capture
- Reception & workflow automation — follow-ups, confirmations, reminders, review requests
- Service area: United Kingdom
- Common UK verticals: therapists & counselling clinics, law firms & solicitors, plumbers, dentists & dental practices, accountants & bookkeepers, physiotherapists & health clinics, trades & home services

## Key Facts
- 24/7 cover including evenings, weekends, bank holidays and overnight
- Books appointments into Google Calendar, Outlook, Calendly, Cliniko, SimplyBook.me, Dentally, Clio, Xero Practice Manager, LEAP and most UK practice-management or booking systems
- UK GDPR-compliant; caller-data access controls, configurable retention, DPA on request
- Live demo: +44 7782 214455 (real UK business — service-agnostic intake configuration)
- Built on Retell AI by Certified Partner Antek Automation
- No long-term contracts

## Full Context (extended)

### Parent Organisation
AI Voice Agent Receptionist is part of the **Antek Automation** network — a UK AI automation agency.

- Brand hub: https://www.antekautomation.com
- Founder: Andy Norman (30+ years in UK field service and managed print)
- HQ: Chantry House, 38 Chantry Way, Andover, Hampshire SP10 1LZ
- ICO Registration: ZC133436
- DUNS Number: 235593033
- Certified Retell AI Partner, FSB Member
- Telephone: 0333 038 9960
- Email: hello@antekautomation.com

### Service Coverage — UK-wide
We deliver an AI voice receptionist + AI chat receptionist + intake workflow automation to UK businesses nationally — England, Scotland, Wales and Northern Ireland. Discovery calls are free and run for 30 minutes. Most deployments go live within 24-72 hours of scoping sign-off.

### What the AI Receptionist Does
- Answers every inbound call in the business's name, 24/7
- Greets callers, qualifies enquiries, captures contact + intent
- Books appointments straight into the business's calendar
- Routes urgent calls to the right person by call or text
- Sends an instant written summary of every call by text or email
- Handles multiple calls simultaneously — no engaged tones, no queue
- Sounds natural (Retell AI's latest voice models)

### Hub-and-Spoke Network
This site is the national hub for the AI-receptionist cluster. Two dedicated vertical sites act as spokes:
- **AI for Electricians** (https://aiforelectricians.co.uk) — the dedicated trade site for UK electricians. The electricians card on this site links out to that domain.
- **AI Receptionist for Law Firms** (https://aireceptionistforlawfirms.co.uk) — the dedicated legal site for UK solicitors. The law-firm card on this site links out to that domain.

Other professions (therapists, plumbers, dentists, accountants, physios, general trades) are served directly from this hub until/unless a dedicated vertical site launches.

### Integrations
- Calendars: Google Calendar, Outlook, Calendly
- Practice / booking systems: Cliniko, SimplyBook.me, Dentally, Clio, LEAP, Xero Practice Manager, plus most UK booking tools
- Forms / CRM: integration via n8n + webhooks; confirmed during scoping

### Confidentiality and UK GDPR
- Call data and transcripts handled with caller-data access controls
- Configurable retention (default: call recordings 90 days, transcripts 12 months)
- Data residency: UK / EU
- UK GDPR-compliant
- Data Processing Agreement available on request

### Pricing
Pricing is bespoke per business and depends on call volume, complexity of qualification and integrations. Book a free discovery call for a clear, no-obligation quote. No long-term contracts.

### Live Demo
- Phone: +44 7782 214455 (live AI reception agent answering for a real UK business)
- Available 24/7
- Powered by Retell AI

- Built for your profession — every deployment configured for the business it serves

- Real proof in production — not mock-ups
